mission.title: longhorn: [IMPROVEMENT] Introduce Concurrent Job Limit for Snapshot Operations
mission.description: [IMPROVEMENT] Introduce Concurrent Job Limit for Snapshot Operations. Community-requested feature.

steps.title: Check current longhorn deployment
steps.description:
Verify your longhorn version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n longhorn-system -l app.kubernetes.io/name=longhorn
helm list -n longhorn-system 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working longhorn installation.

steps.title: Review longhorn configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant longhorn configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n longhorn-system -l app.kubernetes.io/name=longhorn
kubectl get configmap -n longhorn-system -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=longhorn
```
### Is your improvement request related to a feature? Please describe (👍 if you like this request)

Some snapshot operations may trigger a merge process that temporarily consumes additional storage space, increasing the risk of disk exhaustion.

steps.title: Apply the fix for [IMPROVEMENT] Introduce Concurrent Job Limit for Snapshot…
steps.description: #### Additional documentation or context ```yaml - Take `snapshot 3` 5. Remove the snapshot `snapshot 2` -> trigger snapshot purge 6. During the snapshot deletion, try to execute snapshot purge manually ```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n longhorn-system -l app.kubernetes.io/name=longhorn
kubectl get events -n longhorn-system --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "[IMPROVEMENT] Introduce Concurrent Job Limit for Snapshot…" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary: See the fix PR for the community-verified solution: https://github.com/longhorn/longhorn/pull/12204
codeSnippets: - Take `snapshot 3` 5. Remove the snapshot `snapshot 2` -> trigger snapshot purge 6. During the snapshot deletion, try to execute snapshot purge manually

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with longhorn installed or the issue environment reproducible.
